measurement_note: Size is the number of distinct root-level mkdir operations before one root listing. Hash-mapped trie children make each insertion expected O(1) at this depth before the final sort; storing children in a linear list makes each new sibling search the entire existing list and grows quadratically.

cases.name: benchmark: create and list 64 root directories
benchmark: create and list 256 root directories
benchmark: create and list 512 root directories
